underlying_goal: Configure Claude Code to auto-allow all MCP tool calls in don't-ask mode without manual approval
friction_detail: Claude first tried a broad mcp__* wildcard that didn't work, then used an incorrect tool name pattern for context-mode that caused a permission denial.
brief_summary: User wanted all MCP tools auto-allowed in don't-ask mode; Claude fixed permission patterns iteratively but the broad wildcard failed and a naming mismatch caused errors before being corrected.
